case_title: ELEVATED SYSTEMS INC. ET AL VS. OLD KAI DISTRIBUTION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELEVATED SYSTEMS INC. PURPLE STAR MD COLLECTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT OLD KAI DISTRIBUTION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-22-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OLD KAI DISTRIBUTION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PURPLE STAR MD COLLECTIVE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-10-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELEVATED SYSTEMS INC., REPRESENTED BY BRIAN WONG, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PURPLE STAR MD COLLECTIVE REPRESENTED BY BRIAN WONG, BUYER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PER THE PLAINTIFF, THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES AT THE DECEMBER 5TH 2018 HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE; CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
